LAW AND MOTION 302, RULILNG: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT VIKING TRANSPORT, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFFS ARE GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND, IF THEY CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE AS TO THE SECOND AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION THAT DEFENDANT'S ACTIONS WERE PERFORMED WITH SOME STATE OF CULPABILITY GREATER THAN MERE NEGLIGENCE. Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-25-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT VIKING TRANSPORT, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION as to the 2nd and 3rd causes of action and punitive damages is off calendar as moot. The complaint sought punitive damages as to the second and third causes of action. On November 15, 2013, Plaintiff filed a dismissal with prejudice which included a dismissal of these causes of action. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-03-2013 Set For Trial On Feb-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Set For Trial On Nov-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Reset From Apr-24-13 To May-01-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: courtney cassinelli, esq., 415.576.1500, for plaintiff lev sigal.
james regan, esq., 415.981.6630, for defendant viking transport, inc.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT VIKING TRANSPORT, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied. In light of the ruling on the demurrer, the motion to strike punitive damage claims and attorney fees is denied. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: courtney cassinelli, esq., 415.576.1500, for plaintiff lev sigal.
james regan, esq., 415.981.6630, for defendant viking transport, inc.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT VIKING TRANSPORT, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff's first amended complaint sufficiently pleads causes of action for elder abuse (2nd cause of action) and willful misconduct (3rd cause of action). Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Continued To Apr-24-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James F. Regan, Esq. of Low Ball Y Lynch, Tel. 415.981.6630 for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULILNG: The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT VIKING TRANSPORT, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Denied as moot in light of the Court's ruling on the demurrer. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James F. Regan, Esq. of Low Ball Y Lynch, Tel. 415.981.6630 for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULILNG: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT VIKING TRANSPORT, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiffs are granted leave to amend, if they can do so in good faith, to allege as to the second and third causes of action that Defendant's actions were performed with some state of culpability greater than mere negligence. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
